notes: Authored from the OpenBoxes API guide (no machine spec published). The adaptor uses generic get/post/request against /openboxes/api paths. Covers products, categories, locations, stock movements and the generic domain API. Most endpoints wrap payloads in a {data:...} envelope; the dedicated products list/detail endpoints are a documented exception that return raw arrays/objects (modeled that way). stockMovements dates are MM/DD/YYYY strings while product dates are ISO 8601. organization/active on Location are unverified and omitted.
